en.text: a prolonged form of a primary στάω (of the same meaning, and used for it in certain tenses); to stand (transitively or intransitively), used in various applications (literally or figuratively)

senses.gloss_en: a prolonged form of a primary στάω (of the same meaning, and used for it in certain tenses); to stand (transitively or intransitively), used in various applications (literally or figuratively)
